overview: SynergenX provides customized testosterone replacement therapy (TRT) for men, bioidentical hormone replacement therapy (BHRT) for women, and medically supervised GLP-1 weight loss therapies. All care is supervised by board-certified professionals.
highlights: Customized TRT tailored to individual hormone levels, symptoms, and goals
Bioidentical hormones (BHRT) for women's hormone therapy
Medically supervised GLP-1 weight loss therapies
targetAudience: Men seeking testosterone optimization, women experiencing menopause or perimenopause, and individuals pursuing hormone-based weight loss and wellness.
